---
title: "Training Report"
author: "Jan Cap"
date: now
output: html_document
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
execute:
  echo: false
---

```{python}
#| tags: [parameters]
#| label: parameters-setup

input_path: str = "data/final/feature_matrix.csv"
training_config_path: str = "configs/training.yaml"

```

```{python}
#| label: libraries-setup

import os

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import pandas as pd
import shap
import yaml
from IPython.display import display, Markdown
from geoscore_de.modelling.config import TrainingConfig
from geoscore_de.modelling.plots.diagnostic_plots import build_predicted_vs_actual_plot, build_residual_plot
from geoscore_de.modelling.train import Trainer
```

```{python}
#| label: load-data

# load input data
df = pd.read_csv(input_path)

# load training config
with open(training_config_path, "r") as f:
    training_config = TrainingConfig(**yaml.safe_load(f))
```

## Preprocessing and feature engineering

```{python}
#| label: feature-selection-summary

# Print summary of feature selection for report
feature_cfg = training_config.feature_filtering

used_features = feature_cfg.use_features or "ALL"
omitted_features = feature_cfg.omit_features or "NONE"

print("### Feature selection criteria")
print("\n**Features to use:**", used_features)
print("\n**Features to omit:**", omitted_features)
```


## Model training

```{python}
#| label: model-training
#| output: false

# train model
result = Trainer(training_config).train(df)
```

## Model evaluation

```{python}
#| label: train-evaluation
# Cross-validation stability summary for the best model
cv_results_df = pd.DataFrame(result.grid_search.cv_results_)
best_idx = result.grid_search.best_index_
best_row = cv_results_df.loc[best_idx]
cv_folds = int(result.grid_search.cv)

metric_specs = [
    {"key": "r2", "label": "R²", "lower_is_better": False},
    {"key": "mae", "label": "MAE", "lower_is_better": True},
    {"key": "mse", "label": "MSE", "lower_is_better": True},
    {"key": "rmse", "label": "RMSE", "lower_is_better": True},
    {"key": "mape", "label": "MAPE", "lower_is_better": True},
    {"key": "median_ae", "label": "Median AE", "lower_is_better": True},
    {"key": "max_error", "label": "Max Error", "lower_is_better": True},
    {"key": "explained_variance", "label": "Explained Variance", "lower_is_better": False},
]


def to_display_value(raw_value: float, lower_is_better: bool) -> float:
    if lower_is_better:
        return -raw_value
    return raw_value


summary_rows = []
for spec in metric_specs:
    metric_key = spec["key"]
    mean_test_col = f"mean_test_{metric_key}"
    std_test_col = f"std_test_{metric_key}"
    mean_train_col = f"mean_train_{metric_key}"
    std_train_col = f"std_train_{metric_key}"

    if mean_test_col not in cv_results_df.columns or std_test_col not in cv_results_df.columns:
        continue

    val_mean = to_display_value(best_row[mean_test_col], spec["lower_is_better"])
    val_std = best_row[std_test_col]

    row = {
        "Metric": spec["label"],
        "Validation Mean": val_mean,
        "Validation Std": val_std,
        "Validation 95% CI (half-width)": 1.96 * val_std / (cv_folds ** 0.5),
    }

    if mean_train_col in cv_results_df.columns and std_train_col in cv_results_df.columns:
        train_mean = to_display_value(best_row[mean_train_col], spec["lower_is_better"])
        train_std = best_row[std_train_col]
        row["Training Mean"] = train_mean
        row["Training Std"] = train_std
        row["Training 95% CI (half-width)"] = 1.96 * train_std / (cv_folds ** 0.5)

    summary_rows.append(row)

cv_summary_df = pd.DataFrame(summary_rows)

display(Markdown("### Cross-validation stability (best model, all metrics)"))
display(
    cv_summary_df.style.format(
        {
            "Validation Mean": "{:.4f}",
            "Validation Std": "{:.4f}",
            "Validation 95% CI (half-width)": "{:.4f}",
            "Training Mean": "{:.4f}",
            "Training Std": "{:.4f}",
            "Training 95% CI (half-width)": "{:.4f}",
        }
    ).set_caption("CV aggregated metrics (mean ± std) for selected hyperparameters")
)

fold_rows = []
for spec in metric_specs:
    metric_key = spec["key"]
    split_test_cols = sorted(
        [col for col in cv_results_df.columns if col.startswith("split") and col.endswith(f"_test_{metric_key}")]
    )
    for col in split_test_cols:
        fold_num = int(col.split("_")[0].replace("split", "")) + 1
        fold_rows.append(
            {
                "Metric": spec["label"],
                "Fold": fold_num,
                "Validation Score": to_display_value(best_row[col], spec["lower_is_better"]),
            }
        )

fold_scores_df = pd.DataFrame(fold_rows).sort_values(["Metric", "Fold"]).reset_index(drop=True)

# add this as hidable detail
display(Markdown("<details><summary>Fold-level validation scores</summary>"))
display(
    fold_scores_df.style.format({"Validation Score": "{:.4f}"}).set_caption(
        "Fold-level validation scores for selected hyperparameters"
    )
)
display(Markdown("</details>"))
```

```{python}
#| label: test-evaluation
metrics = result.evaluate(create_plots=False)

# plot real vs predicted values and residuals
y_pred = result.best_estimator.predict(result.X_test)

red_v_actual_plot = build_predicted_vs_actual_plot(result.y_test, y_pred)
display(red_v_actual_plot)

residual_plot = build_residual_plot(result.y_test, y_pred)
display(residual_plot)

# Show evaluation metrics as a styled DataFrame
metrics_df = pd.DataFrame(list(metrics.items()), columns=["Metric", "Value"])
display(metrics_df.style.format({"Value": "{:.4f}"}).set_caption("Test set evaluation metrics"))

# Optionally display diagnostic plots
if os.path.exists("model_diagnostics.png"):
    print("### Model Diagnostics Plot")
    display(Markdown(f"![Model Diagnostics Plot](model_diagnostics.png)"))
```

## SHAP analysis
```{python}
# SHAP analysis: Identify most relevant features for model predictions


# Use the best trained model from the earlier section
explainer = shap.Explainer(result.best_estimator, result.X_test)
shap_values = explainer(result.X_test)



# Plot feature importance (summary plot) inline (do not save to disk)
display(Markdown("### SHAP Feature Importance"))
shap.summary_plot(shap_values, result.X_test, show=True)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
plt.close()

# Optionally, show a bar plot for average absolute SHAP values inline (do not save to disk)
display(Markdown("#### SHAP Feature Importance (Bar)"))
shap.summary_plot(shap_values, result.X_test, plot_type="bar", show=True)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
plt.close()
```
```
